---
title: "Foundational Learning"
author: "Kevin Shih"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 5
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: false
    df_print: paged
    code_folding: hide
    highlight: pygments
subtitle: ''
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
print("Foundational Learning - this is a test")
```










This was last updated 7/7/2026
